Package com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel

package com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ListeningHistoryViewModel
    Loads paginated listening history rows for the Analytics page.
    MonthlyReportViewModel
    Loads monthly report data asynchronously for a given year and month.
    StatCardsViewModel
    ViewModel for the dashboard stat cards.
    TopAlbumsViewModel
    Loads paginated top album rows for the Analytics page.
    TopArtistsViewModel
    ViewModel for artist-related analytics views.
    TopSongsViewModel
    Loads paginated top song rows for the Analytics page.
    WeeklyReportViewModel
    Loads weekly report data asynchronously for a given year and ISO week number.
    YearEndReportViewModel
    ViewModel for the Year-End report view.
    YearEndReportViewModel.WrappedData
    All data needed to render one year's wrapped screen.
